headline: Session 46 turns every roster into a living football world: usage is merit- and availability-aware, players carry evolving personal stories, and the box score now reads like a truthful broadcast command center.

items.title: NFL-role usage and Potential system
items.evidence: Healthy QB1/K1/P1 own 100% of role volume; other rooms use OVR/POT/fit/morale merit; injury substitution and restoration are regression-tested.

items.title: Living player dossiers
items.evidence: Every supported position generates deterministic personalized bios, facts, traits, actual achievements, and career milestone progress.

items.title: Truthful broadcast box score
items.evidence: Observed team/player matrices, snaps, punting, blocking, quarter scoring, and a labeled source-derived Impact Index shipped.

items.title: All-actions reliability net
items.evidence: Trusted Commissioner popup flow and a 100+ button contract inventory shipped; the inventory found and fixed Agent Negotiation ID drift.

followUps.title: Launch evidence
followUps.evidence: Obtain real football@playfranchisearchitect.com delivery proof and current live-origin evidence before any SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: SPARKED flip
blockers.evidence: External evidence gate only; no product or doctor blocker remains.

honestyLedger.title: Impact Index boundary
honestyLedger.evidence: The index is visibly labeled and computed from recorded player output; it is not presented as an observed NFL statistic.

honestyLedger.title: Control-plane helper gap
honestyLedger.evidence: Public repo lacks local rescore/state-vector/entropy/genome/closeout-autopilot helpers; no sibling tree was edited to simulate completion.

honestyLedger.title: Launch state preserved
honestyLedger.evidence: No email receipt or live-origin evidence was fabricated, so public-unlaunched remains accurate.

diffStat.suite: Direct shards 317/317; Playwright 18/18; focused 24/24; Pages build/smoke; doctor blockingFailing 0.
